$comment: CS-FIXTURES — GROUND TRUTH for the DETERMINISTIC competitor landscape analyzer (engine/brand-dna/competitor-landscape.js analyzeCompetitorPatterns). A test runs the analyzer over the fixture competitor corpora (4 items: comp-001..004 for orbit-outfitters) and asserts these stats. Counts are exact and hand-verifiable from the 4 synthetic competitor items. PATTERNS ONLY: no verbatim competitor text. NOT bound to a published schema — it is the analyzer expected OUTPUT shape, asserted field-by-field in tests/competitor-scan-schema.test.js. ALL SYNTHETIC.
